title: psychotria oleandrella
intro: Psychotria oleandrella is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the wild coffee or false coffee tree. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria oleandrella include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as the treatment of various infections and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams for external use.
